name: American Software, Inc.
description: American Software, Inc., through its subsidiary Logility, Inc., provides collaborative supply chain management, inventory optimization, and retail planning solutions. The company delivers enterprise software and software-as-a-service (SaaS) applications designed to help businesses streamline their supply chain operations, improve forecasting accuracy, optimize inventory levels, and enhance overall operational efficiency. Serving a diverse range of industries globally, American Software enables organizations to synchronize demand, supply, and retail planning processes to drive profitable growth.
